question: Based on the chart, what can we say about the average number of website visits for the entire week?

options.A: It is about 34 visits, averaging only the days with visible bars
options.B: It is about 15 visits, averaging across all seven days of the week
options.C: It cannot be reliably determined from the data shown
options.D: It must be exactly 30 visits because the bars look similar

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
